hero.headline: Find a free Kita spot near you
hero.subline: KitaRadar brings all childcare facilities onto one map – with AI-powered search assistance, auto-generated cover letters, and community tips from other parents.

stats.parents_frustrated: parents find the search process confusing

features.headline: Everything you need for your Kita search
features.subline: From radius search to a finished application – in one seamless workflow.

map.title: Map-based radius search
map.desc: All Kitas near you on one map – across all providers and operators. Filter by radius, operator type, and concept.

ai_search.title: AI search assistant
ai_search.desc: The AI prioritises the most suitable facilities based on your preferences: concept, age, opening hours, distance.

ai_apply.title: AI application generator
ai_apply.desc: Personalised cover letter at the click of a button. Your email client opens with recipient and text pre-filled.

community.title: Community feed
community.desc: Real-time experiences and capacity hints from other parents. Always current, never outdated.

tracking.title: Application tracking
tracking.desc: Keep track: which Kita has an active application and what is the current status?

free.title: Start for free
free.desc: 10 searches per month free. Pro upgrade for unlimited use and AI features from €7.99/month.

step1.title: Set your area
step1.desc: Enter an address, choose a radius and see the first results.

step2.title: AI filters for you
step2.desc: The assistant narrows the selection to your preferences.

step3.title: Generate application
step3.desc: AI creates an individual cover letter for each Kita.

step4.title: Send email
step4.desc: One click – your email client opens with everything pre-filled.

pricing.headline: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subline: Start for free. Upgrade when you need more.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: We'll send you a reset link
reset.success: Email sent! Please check your inbox.

applications.title: My Applications
applications.empty: No applications yet. Start your search!

upgrade_banner.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade_banner.desc: You have {remaining} of 10 free searches remaining.

search.title: Search Kitas
search.no_results: No Kitas found. Try increasing the search radius.
search.ai_placeholder: Describe what matters to you (e.g. Montessori, full-day, under 2 km)...
search.free_limit_warning: You have reached the limit of 10 free searches.

footer.tagline: Find free Kita spots – simple, fast, AI-powered.

application.ai_hint: The AI creates a personalised cover letter based on your child's data.
